|desc={{p|Morpeko}} is Marnie's first known Pokémon. Morpeko is always seen accompanying Marnie.
In ''[[TW04|Early-Evening Waves]]'',  Morpeko is seen eating at a [[Battle Café]] accompanied by Marnie. 

In ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', Morpeko is seen with her Trainer watching the battle between [[Leon]] and [[Raihan]]. 

In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Morpeko is seen next to Marnie celebrating the invitation to the [[Galarian Star Tournament]].

None of Morpeko's moves are known.}}
